_meta: Translator context for Jellyfin Enhanced. Each key describes where/how the translation string is used. {{icon:name}} placeholders are auto-replaced with icons and should NOT be translated. {variable} placeholders are replaced at runtime with dynamic values.
toast_search: Toast notification shown when the user presses the search shortcut key
toast_home: Toast notification shown when navigating to the home page via shortcut
toast_dashboard: Toast notification shown when navigating to the admin dashboard via shortcut
toast_random_item_loaded: Toast notification shown when a random media item is selected
toast_speed: Toast shown when playback speed changes. {speed} is the numeric multiplier (e.g., 1.5, 2.0)
toast_speed_normal: Toast shown when playback speed is reset to 1x
toast_jumped_to: Toast shown when jumping to a position. {percent} is a number 0-100
toast_subtitle: Toast shown when subtitle track changes. {subtitle} is the track name (e.g., 'English SRT')
toast_audio: Toast shown when audio track changes. {audio} is the track name (e.g., 'Japanese AAC 5.1')
toast_aspect_ratio: Toast shown when cycling aspect ratio. {ratio} is the ratio name (e.g., '16:9', 'Fill')
toast_feature_status: Generic toast for feature toggle. {feature} is the feature name (already translated), {status} is 'Enabled'/'Disabled' (already translated)
toast_at_least_one_item_type: Error toast when user deselects all item types in random button settings
toast_subtitle_style: Toast shown when cycling subtitle styles. {style} is the style name
toast_subtitle_size: Toast shown when changing subtitle size. {size} is the size name
toast_subtitle_font: Toast shown when changing subtitle font. {font} is the font family name
toast_random_selection_status: Toast when toggling item type in random selection. {item_type} is 'Movies' or 'Shows', {status} is 'included'/'excluded' (from selection_included/selection_excluded)
status_enabled: Used in toast_feature_status as {status} when a feature is turned on
status_disabled: Used in toast_feature_status as {status} when a feature is turned off
feature_auto_pause: Feature name shown in toggle toast. Auto-pause pauses video when switching browser tabs.
feature_auto_resume: Feature name shown in toggle toast. Auto-resume resumes video when returning to the tab.
feature_auto_pip: Feature name. PiP = Picture-in-Picture (small floating video window).
feature_auto_skip_intro: Feature name. Automatically skips TV show intros (requires Intro-Skipper plugin).
feature_auto_skip_outro: Feature name. Automatically skips TV show outros/credits.
feature_quality_tags: Feature name. Quality tags show resolution badges (4K, HDR, etc.) on media posters.
feature_genre_tags: Feature name. Genre tags show genre icons on media posters.
feature_language_tags: Feature name. Language tags show audio language flags on media posters.
feature_rating_tags: Feature name. Rating tags show TMDB/Rotten Tomatoes scores on media posters.
feature_custom_pause_screen: Feature name. Shows a stylized overlay with media info when video is paused.
feature_long_press_2x_speed: Feature name. Long-pressing on video plays at 2x speed (primarily for touch devices).
panel_version: Shown in the settings panel footer. {version} is the plugin version number (e.g., '2.5.0')
panel_shortcuts_tab: Tab label in the settings panel for keyboard shortcut customization
panel_settings_tab: Tab label in the settings panel for user preferences
panel_shortcuts_listening: Shown when waiting for the user to press a key to rebind a shortcut
panel_shortcuts_footer: Help text at bottom of shortcuts panel. <kbd> tags render as keyboard key visuals. Do not translate HTML tags.
panel_settings_auto_skip_depends: Info text explaining that auto-skip requires the separate Intro-Skipper Plugin
panel_settings_ui_remove_continue_watchi: Warning that removing from Continue Watching also removes watch progress data
panel_footer_close: Help text showing how to close the panel. <kbd> tags render as keyboard keys. Do not translate HTML tags.
panel_settings_language_display_desc: Description for the language selector dropdown in user settings
panel_settings_language_clear_cache_desc: Description for the clear cache button. Translations are cached locally and fetched from GitHub.
toast_language_changed: Toast shown after changing display language, before page refreshes
toast_translation_cache_cleared: Toast shown after clearing translation cache. {count} is the number of cached translations removed
jellyseerr_toast_filter_on: Toast when Seerr-only search filter is activated. Seerr is an external request management app (formerly called Jellyseerr).
jellyseerr_toast_filter_off: Toast when search filter is deactivated, showing all results again
jellyseerr_icon_active_tooltip: Tooltip on the Seerr icon when connected. Two lines separated by \n
jellyseerr_icon_active_filter_tooltip: Tooltip on the Seerr icon when filter mode is active. Two lines separated by \n
jellyseerr_no_results_jellyfin: Shown when a search returns no results from Jellyfin. {query} is the search text
jellyseerr_btn_request: Button to request a movie/show be added to the media server via Seerr
jellyseerr_btn_request_4k: Button to request in 4K quality specifically
jellyseerr_btn_request_more: Button shown when some but not all seasons are available
jellyseerr_btn_request_missing: Button to request episodes/seasons that are missing from the library
jellyseerr_btn_blocklisted: Status for items that have been blocklisted in Seerr (will not be downloaded)
jellyseerr_modal_toast_request_success: Success toast after requesting seasons. {count} is number of seasons, {title} is the show name
jellyseerr_advanced_options: Collapsible section header in request modal for advanced server/quality settings
jellyseerr_server_select: Label for dropdown to select which Sonarr/Radarr server to download to
jellyseerr_quality_select: Label for dropdown to select download quality profile
jellyseerr_folder_select: Label for dropdown to select root download folder
jellyseerr_season_specials: Label for Season 0 (specials/extras) in season selection
jellyseerr_season_name: Season label in selection list. {number} is the season number
jellyseerr_seasons_available: Summary text. {count} is the number of seasons currently available
jellyseerr_all_seasons: Summary text. {count} is the total number of seasons
jellyseerr_seasons_accounted_for: Summary. {count} seasons that are either available or requested, {total} is total seasons
jellyseerr_modal_toast_select_movie: Error toast when no movies are selected in a collection request
jellyseerr_toast_collection_requested: Brief success text after requesting movies from a collection
jellyseerr_toast_movies: Noun 'movies', appended after a count in collection request toast
jellyseerr_report_issue_button: Button on media detail page to report a quality/availability issue to Seerr
jellyseerr_report_unavailable_button: Button text when reporting is not possible for this item
jellyseerr_report_issue_season: Label for season number input when reporting an issue with a specific episode
jellyseerr_report_issue_episode: Label for episode number input when reporting an issue with a specific episode
elsewhere_settings_title: Section title for streaming availability search settings (JustWatch integration)
elsewhere_settings_country: Label for the primary country to search for streaming availability
elsewhere_settings_other_countries: Label for additional countries to search. Empty means only the default country is used.
elsewhere_settings_providers: Label for streaming provider filter. Empty means show all providers found.
elsewhere_panel_available_in: Header when a title is available on streaming services. {region} is a country name
elsewhere_panel_not_available_in: Shown when no streaming services have this title. {region} is a country name
elsewhere_panel_not_available_in_regions: Shown when no services have this title across multiple countries. {regions} is a comma-separated list of country names
elsewhere_panel_available_in_region: Header for a specific country's streaming results. {region} is a country name
random_button_tooltip: Tooltip for the random play button in the header. (R) is the default keyboard shortcut.
remove_continue_watching_error_api: Error message when the API call to remove from Continue Watching fails. {error} is the error message
shortcut_OpenSearch: Keyboard shortcut description shown in the shortcuts panel
shortcut_CycleAspectRatio: Shortcut description. Cycles through available aspect ratios (16:9, Fill, etc.)
shortcut_ShowPlaybackInfo: Shortcut description. Shows technical playback information overlay
shortcut_BookmarkCurrentTime: Shortcut description. Saves the current playback position as a bookmark
shortcut_OpenEpisodePreview: Shortcut description. Opens a preview/navigation panel for episodes
shortcut_SkipIntroOutro: Shortcut description. Manually triggers the intro/outro skip
shortcut_JumpToPercentage: Shortcut description. Number keys 0-9 jump to that percentage of the video
reviews_title: Section header for user reviews. {count} is the number of reviews
bookmark_file_changed: Warning shown when the media file has been replaced since the bookmark was created (timestamps may be off)
bookmark_duplicate_subtitle: Shown when bookmarks exist across multiple file versions. {count} is item count, but note: this is about items with bookmarks on multiple versions, not duplicate bookmarks
bookmark_primary_version: Badge label for the current/active version of a media file
bookmark_old_version: Badge label for a previous/replaced version of a media file
bookmark_adjust_offset: Button to shift bookmark timestamps when a file has been replaced (e.g., different intro length)
bookmark_merge_primary: Button to copy bookmarks from old file versions into the current version
bookmark_split_versions: Summary text. {count} is total bookmarks, {versions} is how many file versions they span
bookmark_offset_label: Label for the time offset input (in seconds) when adjusting bookmark timestamps
bookmark_offset_help: Help text for the offset input. Positive shifts bookmarks later, negative shifts earlier, 0 just clears sync markers.
bookmark_offset_cleared: Success message after clearing sync markers. {count} is bookmarks affected
bookmark_offset_applied: Success message after shifting bookmarks. {count} is bookmarks affected, {offset} is the seconds shifted (e.g., '+5', '-10')
bookmark_migrated: Success toast after moving bookmarks to a new file version. {count} is bookmarks moved, {name} is the media item name
bookmark_merge_confirm: Confirmation dialog text. {count} is the number of bookmarks that will be copied from old versions to the primary version
bookmark_merge_success: Success toast after merging bookmarks. {count} is bookmarks merged
bookmark_time_placeholder: Placeholder text in the time input field for manual bookmark entry
bookmark_count: Shown next to a media item in the bookmarks library view. {count} is number of bookmarks on that item
bookmark_synced_count: Shown when bookmarks were migrated from another version. {count} is migrated bookmark count
bookmark_for_item: Appended to synced bookmark count. {name} is the source media item name
bookmark_from: Label showing the origin file of a migrated bookmark. {source} is the original item name
discovery_more_from_studio: Section header on detail pages. {studio} is the production studio name (e.g., 'Marvel Studios')
discovery_more_with_genre: Section header. {genre} is a genre name (e.g., 'Action', 'Comedy')
discovery_more_with_tag: Section header. {tag} is a content tag (e.g., 'Superhero', 'Based on Novel')
discovery_more_from_person: Section header. {person} is an actor/director name
requests_just_now: Relative time label for something that happened less than a minute ago
requests_coming_soon: Section header for upcoming media releases with estimated dates
requests_today: Relative date used in upcoming releases (e.g., 'Arriving today')
requests_tomorrow: Relative date used in upcoming releases
requests_in_days: Relative date. {days} is a number of days until release
requests_on_date: Absolute date for upcoming releases. {date} is a formatted date string
calendar_cinema_release: Badge label for theatrical/cinema release dates in the calendar
calendar_digital_release: Badge label for digital streaming release dates
calendar_physical_release: Badge label for Blu-ray/DVD physical release dates
calendar_include_unmonitored: Toggle label in calendar filters. 'Unmonitored' means items not actively tracked by Sonarr/Radarr.
hidden_content_toggle_desc: Description for the master toggle. 'Browsing surfaces' means library views, search results, discovery pages, etc.
hidden_content_confirm_body: Confirmation dialog explaining what hiding does. Keep the flow: surfaces listed, then how to undo.
hidden_content_confirm_suppress_15m: Checkbox label to temporarily disable the confirmation dialog for 15 minutes
hidden_content_show_buttons_desc: Description explaining that turning off hide buttons keeps filtering active but removes the UI buttons
hidden_content_confirm_surface_body: Brief prompt in the multi-choice hide dialog
hidden_content_confirm_hide_scoped: 'Next Up' and 'Continue Watching' are Jellyfin homepage sections. This option hides only from those, not from library/search.
hidden_content_scope_nextup: Label for the limited-scope hiding option (only Next Up and Continue Watching sections)
hidden_content_scope_badge: Short badge label for items hidden from Next Up/Continue Watching only. CW = Continue Watching.
hidden_content_n_hidden_items: Summary in the management panel. {count} is always 2 or more
hidden_content_season_label: Label in hidden content management. {number} is the season number
pausescreen_ends_at: Shown on the pause screen overlay. {time} is a clock time (e.g., '10:45 PM')
pausescreen_watched_percent: Progress indicator on pause screen. {percent} is a number 0-100
toast_api_client_unavailable: Error toast when the Jellyfin API client is not initialized (rare edge case)
toast_session_not_found: Error toast when no active playback session is found
